disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset after a fall onto an outstretched hand 45 minutes ago, with an immediate 'pop' felt in the shoulder
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I tripped on a rug and fell onto my outstretched hand about 45 minutes ago, and I felt a sickening pop in my shoulder straight away.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absolute inability to move the joint actively or passively; the arm is locked out from the body
trigger_question_examples: Can you move the arm at all?
Is the arm stuck in one position?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I can't move it at all, it's stuck out from my body and any movement is agony.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Visible gross deformity — a squared-off shoulder contour and an abnormal bony prominence at the front, compared with the other side
trigger_question_examples: Does the shoulder look different from the other side?
Can you see any deformity or a lump?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it looks squared-off and there's a lump sticking out at the front, it doesn't look like my other shoulder at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Numbness and tingling over the outer aspect of the upper arm (lateral upper arm)
trigger_question_examples: Any numbness, tingling or pins-and-needles anywhere in the arm?
Is the skin over the outer part of your upper arm feeling normal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, the outside of my upper arm feels numb and tingly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Distal limb status — the hand is still warm and pink, the fingers can be felt and moved, and the wrist pulse feels present
trigger_question_examples: What colour is your hand — is it pink and warm, or pale/blue and cold?
Can you feel and wiggle your fingers, and does the hand feel normal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My hand is still warm and looks pink, and I can feel and move my fingers okay — it's mainly the outside of my upper arm that's numb.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe pain with no analgesia taken; cannot mobilise safely to a vehicle without help
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any pain relief?
Are you able to get to a car safely?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't taken anything for the pain, and there's no way I can get to a car on my own — I need help.
